posts.author: MariPFonseca (Mariana)
posts.cookedHtml:
HELP!! Please

Hi Guys, i´m trying to duplicate subitens between boards.
I need that every time that a subitem is created and someone is tagged this specific subitem need to be duplicated in another board.
Every time I create a automation it duplicate the item, but not the subitem.

image1311×527 72.5 KB

Is that even possible?

Thank you so much in advance

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @MariPFonseca ,

Welcome to the monday community!

Unfortunately you cannot yet create subitems in another board via trigger in a separate board. You would need to set up an automation like the following to create the subitems.

image1142×320 16.9 KB

If that does not fit your use case, you would need to use something like Make.com to achieve what you are looking to do.

Let me know should you need any professional help with that.

Best Regards,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
